name: monorepo-starter
description: MonoKit — 开源企业级全栈基座（NestJS 11 + Vue 3 + Prisma 7 + GraphQL + RBAC）

scripts.dev: pnpm dev:web & pnpm dev:admin & pnpm dev:server & wait
scripts.dev:web: lsof -ti:5174 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm -F @apps/web dev
scripts.dev:admin: lsof -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm -F @apps/admin dev
scripts.dev:server: PORT=$(grep '^PORT=' apps/server/.env | cut -d= -f2) && PORT=${PORT:-3000} && lsof -ti:$PORT | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm -F @apps/server start:dev
scripts.db:studio: cd apps/server && pnpm exec prisma studio --browser none
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/server && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:generate: cd apps/server && pnpm exec prisma generate
scripts.db:format: cd apps/server && pnpm exec prisma format
scripts.db:format:check: cd apps/server && pnpm exec prisma format --check
